title: Protocol package: types, Zod schemas, ID generation
description: Build @sisu/protocol with all core interfaces (ExternalRef, WorkItem, RoleDefinition, CapabilityDefinition, WorkflowTemplate, ExecutionPlan, AgentMail, RuntimeLease, AdapterRegistration), Zod schemas for runtime validation, ID generators (wrk/plan/mail/run/lease_{ulid}), version constant, barrel exports. TypeScript strict, zero any. 90%+ test coverage. See .overstory/specs/phase-1-protocol-and-storage.md section 1.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-protocol/sisu-7443. 58 tests pass, lint/typecheck clean.

title: Core package: storage interface, SQLite, roles, lifecycle
description: Build @sisu/core with: (1) SisuStorage interface (work items, plans, mail, leases, roles, workflows CRUD), (2) SQLite implementation via better-sqlite3 with optimistic versioning, JSON columns, parameterized queries, (3) Role registry loading 9 built-in roles with canSpawn enforcement, (4) Work item lifecycle state machine with valid transition validation. Depends on @sisu/protocol. 90%+ test coverage. See .overstory/specs/phase-1-protocol-and-storage.md section 2.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/merger-core/sisu-1863. 98 tests, 98.57% coverage, lint/typecheck clean.

title: Templates: 9 role definitions + 5 workflow templates
description: Build @sisu/templates-default with: (1) 9 role markdown templates (orchestrator, coordinator, supervisor, scout, builder, reviewer, lead, merger, monitor) each with description, responsibilities, can/cannot do, default model tier, (2) 5 workflow YAML templates (simple-task, build-review, scout-build-review, multi-stream-feature, rework-loop), (3) Package.json and tsconfig. Roles must define correct tiers, access levels, canSpawn arrays, modelPreference per SPEC.md. See .overstory/specs/phase-1-protocol-and-storage.md section 3.
closeReason: Merged @sisu/templates-default onto merger branch via cherry-pick (19f5d57, 11f5942). Conflicts: mulch.config.yaml (combined domain entries), pnpm-lock.yaml (regenerated). Tier 2 resolution. 130 tests passing, lint+typecheck clean.

title: Infrastructure: pnpm workspace, package configs, CI plumbing
description: Ensure all packages have proper package.json (with build/lint/typecheck/test scripts), tsconfig.json (extending base), vitest configs. pnpm install must work, pnpm lint (biome) must pass, pnpm typecheck (tsc --noEmit) must pass, pnpm test (vitest) must pass. Wire up cross-package dependencies. This is the glue that makes Phase 1 a working monorepo.
closeReason: Infrastructure covered by protocol lead — pnpm install, lint, typecheck, test all passing.

title: Rebase templates branch on main and resolve merge conflicts
description: The branch overstory/builder-templates/sisu-8b64 has merge conflicts with main on .mulch/mulch.config.yaml and pnpm-lock.yaml (protocol was merged first). Rebase this branch on current main, resolve conflicts (mulch.config.yaml: keep both domain entries; pnpm-lock.yaml: run pnpm install to regenerate), verify quality gates (typecheck, lint, test), commit, and send merge_ready.
closeReason: Rebased overstory/builder-templates/sisu-8b64 onto main in builder-rebase worktree: cherry-picked feat(templates-default) and mulch expertise commits, resolved pnpm-lock.yaml conflict via pnpm install, resolved mulch.config.yaml conflict by keeping both domain entries. All quality gates pass.

title: Runtime adapter: AgentRuntime interface + Claude Code + Codex adapters
description: Build packages/runtime-openclaw/ — the pluggable runtime adapter layer. AgentRuntime interface, SpawnConfig, AgentHandle types. Claude Code CLI adapter (claude --print). Codex CLI adapter (codex exec --full-auto --json). Runtime manager for routing roles to correct adapter. Lease creation and heartbeat tracking. 90%+ test coverage. See .overstory/specs/phase-2-engine-and-runtime.md section 3.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-runtime/sisu-aaaa. 44 tests, 100% coverage, lint/typecheck clean.

title: Core engine: dispatch, mail, queue modules
description: Build packages/core/src/{dispatch,mail,queue}/ — the dispatch engine, mail system, and job queue. Dispatch: briefing assembler, workflow selector, dispatcher, plan executor. Mail: mailbox with send/check/filter. Queue: SQLite-backed job queue with enqueue/claim/complete/fail. Integration test: full flow from work item to plan execution. 90%+ test coverage. See .overstory/specs/phase-2-engine-and-runtime.md sections 1, 2, 4.
closeReason: Merged via rebased branch overstory/builder-rebase/sisu-0b2d. Dispatch, mail, queue modules. 160 tests pass.

title: Rebase and merge core engine branches + update index exports
description: Two branches need rebasing onto main (which now has runtime-openclaw merged): overstory/builder-dispatch/sisu-98c7 and overstory/builder-mail-queue/sisu-98c7. Both conflict on .mulch/mulch.config.yaml. Cherry-pick or reapply their changes onto current main. Also update packages/core/src/index.ts to export dispatch/, mail/, queue/ barrel modules. Run pnpm install, typecheck, lint, test — all must pass including existing protocol+templates+core+runtime tests.
closeReason: Rebase and merge complete. All engine code on main.

title: CLI app: sisu binary with all commands + live dashboard
description: Build apps/cli/ — the sisu CLI binary. Commander-based, every command supports --json. Commands: init (create SQLite DB), health, doctor, work create/list/show/dispatch/cancel/retry, agents/agents stop, mail list/show, roles, workflows, dashboard (live ANSI terminal UI refreshing every 2s showing agents/work items/mail). End-to-end flow: init -> work create -> dispatch -> dashboard -> results. 90%+ test coverage. See .overstory/specs/phase-3-cli-and-dashboard.md.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-cli/sisu-9bb3. 75 tests, 96% coverage, all commands + dashboard.

title: Create README.md with setup, usage, and live testing instructions
description: Write a comprehensive README.md at the project root covering: project description, architecture overview, package structure, prerequisites (Node 22, pnpm, Claude Code CLI, Codex CLI), installation, CLI usage with all commands, live testing walkthrough with Claude Code and Codex, dashboard description, role and workflow reference, development guide, and test commands. Must be clear, practical, and show exactly how to run the MVP end-to-end.
closeReason: Merged README.md — 635 lines, comprehensive setup and live testing guide.

title: Create Mermaid architecture diagrams: MVP flowchart + sequence diagram
description: Create a DIAGRAMS.md file at the project root with comprehensive Mermaid diagrams showing the current MVP design: (1) MVP Flowchart — shows the complete data flow from work item creation through dispatch, workflow selection, plan execution, agent spawning, mail communication, to completion. Include all packages and how they connect. (2) UML-style Sequence Diagram with swimlanes/lifelines — shows the interaction between CLI, Core (Storage/Dispatch/Mail/Queue), Runtime (ClaudeCode/Codex), and Agent. Cover the full lifecycle: init, create work item, dispatch, spawn agent, heartbeat, agent completion, mail delivery, status transitions. Use Mermaid syntax (flowchart TD for flowchart, sequenceDiagram for sequence). Must accurately reflect the actual code, not aspirational features.
closeReason: Merged DIAGRAMS.md — 4 Mermaid diagrams: architecture flowchart, sequence diagram, state machine, package dependencies.
